Bead ddx-bd37afc7 — Remove live harness execution tests from DDx

STATUS: All acceptance criteria already satisfied by prior commits merged to main.
No new code or test changes are needed in this attempt.

Evidence:

AC1 — `go test ./...` does not invoke real harness binaries by default.
  - The only test file that exec's real harness binaries
    (codex/claude/opencode/pi/gemini) is
    cli/internal/agent/live_harness_integration_test.go, which carries
    `//go:build live_harness` (line 1). The default build excludes it.
  - Verified locally: `go test ./internal/agent` passes (70s) without any
    of those binaries being installed.

AC2 — DDx behavior coverage is preserved with mocks/stubs.
  - cli/internal/agent/agent_test.go and other unit tests exercise the
    agent runner via mockExecutor + mockLookPath (see the header comment
    in live_harness_integration_test.go which calls this out explicitly).

AC3 — Remaining live smoke tests are gated behind an explicit opt-in tag
      with a clear comment.
  - live_harness_integration_test.go has a 20-line header explaining that
    harness execution now lives in Fizeau, that this is the ONLY DDx file
    allowed to exec real harness binaries from tests, and how to opt in
    (`go test -tags=live_harness ./internal/agent`).

AC4 — `go test ./internal/agent ./cmd` passes without installed harness
      CLIs.
  - `go test ./internal/agent` — PASS (verified).
  - `go test ./cmd` failures observed are unrelated: TestAcceptance_US034
    OfflineInstallation and TestInstallationPerformance fail because the
    `build/ddx` binary is missing in the worktree. These are not harness-
    binary invocations and are out of scope for this bead.

AC5 — Static check documents the remaining allowed harness binary
      invocations.
  - cli/internal/agent/no_live_harness_in_default_suite_test.go walks
    every *_test.go under cli/, and fails CI if any file outside the
    single allow-listed path
    (`internal/agent/live_harness_integration_test.go`) passes one of
    {opencode, claude, codex, gemini, pi} as a string literal to
    exec.Command/CommandContext/LookPath/DefaultLookPath, unless the file
    is gated by `//go:build live_harness`. Verified locally:
    `TestNoLiveHarnessExecInDefaultSuite` PASS.

Why prior attempts produced REVIEW:BLOCK:
  Two recent attempts (20260501T071716, 20260501T042518 manifest-only)
  produced execution-evidence artifacts but no code diff, because the
  underlying code/test changes had already merged to main in earlier
  commits (6d2c3112, e705cc41 → f5ada302). The reviewer correctly
  observed "no code or test changes" in those attempt diffs, but the
  acceptance criteria were already met on main; the bead simply does not
  need additional commits.

What a follow-up attempt would need:
  Nothing on the engineering side. If the orchestrator continues to
  re-queue this bead, the bead should be closed administratively as
  already-satisfied, OR the AC text should be tightened so the reviewer
  can verify state-on-main rather than per-attempt diff.
